title: GET /health route is not method-restricted
evidence: main.go:30 registers `mux.HandleFunc("/health", api.HealthCheck)` with no method prefix, so POST/PUT/DELETE /health also return 200
suggestion: Register as `GET /health` for consistency with the method-aware /books routes

title: Bare /books/ path returns 400 rather than listing or 404
evidence: handlers.go:79 GetBook does `strconv.ParseInt(TrimPrefix(path,"/books/"), ...)`; a request to `/books/` yields an empty id string and returns `400 invalid book id`
suggestion: Treat an empty trailing id as 404 (not found) or redirect to the list endpoint

title: Duplicate ISBN handled as 409 Conflict (beyond spec)
evidence: handlers.go:47-50 maps a SQLite UNIQUE violation to 409; schema enforces `isbn ... UNIQUE` in models.go:66
suggestion: No action — noting as a positive enhancement over the TASK.md spec

title: created_at/updated_at timestamps tracked (beyond spec)
evidence: models.go:17-18 Book carries CreatedAt/UpdatedAt; Update sets updated_at (models.go:177-186)
suggestion: No action — enhancement beyond the four required fields
